title: CodeGrind: AI-assisted Coding Challenges Meet Cyberpunk Tower Defense
summary: Showcase how CodeGrind blends AI-assisted problem solving with the Code Breach cyberpunk game, highlighting real-time editor interactions and tower-defense visualization of programming concepts.
core_message: CodeGrind now integrates Azure OpenAI-powered guidance into our LeetCode-style challenges, paired with the refreshed Code Breach cyberpunk tower-defense visuals. Solve problems in real-time with AI help, while programming concepts are visualized as defensive towers and actions within the game landscape.
cta: Try a new AI-assisted problem, watch the cyberpunk towers react to your solutions, and share your fastest problem-solving run.
visual_brief: Static or animated teaser showing the CodeGrind editor next to a cyberpunk Code Breach battlefield. Include AI assistant panel guiding through a problem, with towers like ForLoop and IfCondition attacking code snippets. Use dark neon palette, concise captions, and a before/after flow of solving a problem.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
